acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Plain /start now looks up the linked Telegram user and replies with the shared CTA instead of the legacy invite-only text.
Invite-token binding reuses the same linked-start reply helper as plain /start.
Unlinked /start now returns a short guidance message from the shared start-response helper.
Telegram command metadata is exported once and synced through setMyCommands after bot init.

verification.command: npm run lint -- src/lib/bot/handlers/start.ts src/lib/bot/bot-app.ts src/lib/bot/start-response.ts src/lib/bot/start-response.test.ts

notes: Build emits the existing Next.js middleware deprecation warning, but completes successfully.
